title: hahnia suecica
intro: Hahnia suecica, also known as Swedish hahnia or Swedish fern, is a type of lichenized fungus belonging to the family Hahniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hahnia suecica include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and ointments.
